steps.title: Count the deposits by the end of week 5
steps.content: The account starts with 520 dollars at the beginning of week 1. Maya makes a 45-dollar deposit at the end of each week. From the end of week 1 through the end of week 5, there are exactly 5 deposits.

steps.title: Apply the linear formula to find the total
steps.content:
Amount equals the initial balance plus the sum of all deposits:
$$\text{Amount} = 520 + 5 \times 45$$
$$= 520 + 225$$
$$= 745$$
That matches Choice D — $745$.
